recent_excerpts: A trojanized Slack installer delivers a remote access tool that creates a hidden desktop, allowing attackers to bypass multi-factor authentication and silently control victim machines.

Threat actors are abusing the Obsidian note-taking app to deliver the novel PHANTOMPULSE RAT via malicious plugins, targeting individuals in finance and cryptocurrency sectors in a campaign tracked as
Cisco Talos found phishing accounted for over a third of initial access engagements in Q1 2026, surpassing exploitation of public-facing apps for the first time since Q2 2025.
